source_note: Order No. 90948 on Baltimore Gas and Electric Company's application for an electric and gas Multi-Year Rate Plan, Maryland PSC Case No. 9692, issued December 14, 2023 (Maillog 306673). Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF on the Maryland PSC host psc.maryland.gov/wp-content/uploads/ (Cloudflare-fronted but serving); case jacket in the PSC DMS case-search (case 9692).
